changelog: Large app downloads now recover even when the uploaded `.apk.asset.json` file is missing the final GitHub Release asset URL. Open Store can resolve the correct release asset path more reliably, and future admin uploads preserve those URLs instead of overwriting them. Generated Open Store package files now use the current `Open_Store` release channel in their manifest and README download links, so future packaged releases should stop pointing to the older repo path. App downloads now use a more reliable authenticated GitHub download path in direct mode, so store downloads should stop failing across apps in the private repo setup.
